text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, September 26. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, I'm reviewing the patient onboarding specs for Vertex Health. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: That's good medical feedback. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Smart financial planning. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Let's break this down. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /user/verify under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: I checked the recent logs for that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /user/verify. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Staying active is key. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Smart financial planning. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Good focus area. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
